date_notes: Auditor general announced investigation January 31 2025; reported publicly February 6 2025.
title_en: Auditor general launches investigation into AHS procurement following termination of CEO who had sought to meet with auditor
title_fr: Le vérificateur général lance une enquête sur les marchés d'AHS après le congédiement de la PDG qui cherchait à le rencontrer
description_en: Alberta Auditor General Doug Wylie launches an investigation into procurement and contracting within Alberta Health Services, covering chartered surgical facilities, Turkish-manufactured medication, and COVID-19 PPE. The Globe and Mail reports that former AHS CEO Athana Mentzelopoulos was terminated days before a scheduled meeting with the auditor general to discuss her own internal procurement review. NDP Leader Naheed Nenshi calls the allegations 'the strongest I have ever seen against an Alberta government.' AHS board has been replaced by a Deputy Minister administrator.

update_log.change: Sourced from R-093 (CBC/French Feb 6 2025). Extends Turkish medication story and AHS restructuring arc.
